module_results.summary: All route-specific APF certification starters pass.
Route workbench certifies JSON payloads for all six starter routes and rejects expected-label leakage.
Interface Structure Transport Ledger is P: it inventories moving structures before obstruction/promotion certification and generalizes the trace transport ledger architecture.
Interface Structure Discovery Engine is P: raw route payloads discover typed moving-structure ledgers, certify them, and witness every obstruction.
Interface Structure Movement Graph is P: moving structures are explicit source-target edges and every obstruction has a witness path.
Interface Movement Graph Repair Planner is P: failed movement edges become ordered repair actions with closure predicates.
Interface Repair Closure Simulator is P: ordinary repairs can be counterfactually patched and rerun, while provenance/structural blockers refuse auto-patching.
Interface Repair Frontier Explorer is P: it finds minimal ordinary repair bundles, critical fields, and refuses blocked/provenance frontiers.
Interface Repair Obligation Compiler is P: minimal repair bundles become auditable evidence obligations and ready-to-rerun packets.
Interface Evidence Rerun Controller is P: complete evidence patches one minimal bundle and reruns certification, while incomplete/blocked cases do not rerun.
EW Trace-to-Scheme Real Adapter is P: live/manual EW state converts into payloads, certifications, obligations, and safe rerun gating.
Dark Posterior Real Adapter is P: live/manual dark route state converts into payloads, certifications, obligations, and safe rerun gating.
Claim-to-Interface Graph Compiler is P: prose claims compile to conservative interface audits without treating text as evidence.
Interface Atlas is P: many route/claim/codomain graphs aggregate into APF-wide bottleneck and repair-strategy reports across engine axes.

inputs.claim_text: EW APF_TRACE physical scheme masses are exported to global P.
EW trace-sector local APF_TRACE closure is banked as P_local.
Dark sector Cobaya runtime completed but posterior convergence is still under review.
Gauge group appears as a fiber automorphism with cocycle descent.
Horizon area is represented as fiber-cost with capacity bound.
Capacity overspend is relieved by a coarse-grain repair.
The route has target value smuggling and posterior used as input.
Flat substrate C* global action requires complex action, reversal, and operator norm.
A new APF route is claimed to close but route class is unspecified.

axis_summary._cross_axis_note: Per-axis counts above are primary. The top-level flat counts on InterfaceAtlas aggregate across axes and should be read as advisory only (per Reference - APF Interface Engine Family Architecture, Q2: apples-and-oranges risk when an EVALUATOR_MISSING route-axis obstruction is summed with a MARGIN_NONPOSITIVE codomain-axis failure).
